title: Code Reviewer verdict
description: Output shape for the Code Reviewer Agent's sprint-close or §4.3-trigger review. Top-level decision is one of {pass | fix_required | out_of_scope_review} (per role-cards/code-reviewer-agent.md §5.2). Each finding cites severity + layer + evidence + rationale; §1.7 forbidden-list violations are P0 by default.

summary.description: One paragraph; mirrors the 4-line header summary in docs/codex-findings.md.

scope_claim.description: Signed sub-sprint scope claim (the sprint-id and module set the reviewer judged against).

kernel_exemption.description: If decision=pass via exemption (anti-hardcode kernel skipped), name which class.

layer.description: Fix-layer per Constitution §1.5 / process/post-deployment-iteration.md (Δ-9). Universal base layers + profile-specific extension layers (workflow_definition for Type B / A+B hybrid).

constitution_clause.description: Optional: which Constitution §1.7 forbidden item (if any) the finding cites. e.g., '§1.7-A', '§1.7-D'.

kernel_question.description: Optional: which of the 9 anti-hardcode kernel questions (templates/anti-hardcode-review-kernel.md) the finding maps to.
